title: HollowKnight Theme | Simple Voice Chat
description: This resource pack replaces all icons from the "Simple Voice Chat" mod.
body:
![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6714a318a0840e295017d80e7a25bbf669d71d8.png)

# About the resource pack:
This resource pack changes the textures of the buttons in the Simple Voice Chat mod.

This resource pack changes the button textures by adding the atmosphere of the game "Hollow Knight," which is very suitable for fans of this game.

(In the future, the background will be changed)

Need: Simple Voice Chat.

# Note:
Please do not install this resource pack together with other similar ones to avoid conflicts.
